package rulecoverage

import (
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged: shows the risky shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Likely long-lived goroutines launched after a derived context is created and before the matching cancel call is observed.
func PositiveGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanaged(items []int) map[int]int {
    out := map[int]int{}
    var mu sync.Mutex
    var wg sync.WaitGroup
    for _, item := range items {
        mu.Lock()
        time.Sleep(time.Millisecond)
        out[item] = item
        mu.Unlock()
        wg.Add(1)
        go func() { defer wg.Done(); out[item] = item * 2 }()
    }
    wg.Wait()
    return out
}
